(a) n ~ e Board shall ordinarily meet three times during a calendar year. (b) - The meetings of the Board shall be convened by the Chairman either on his own initiative or at therequest of the Director or on a requisition signed by not less than three members of the Board A requisitioned meeting shalI be a special meeting to discuss only those i r m of agenda for which therequisition is made.
